_meta.notes: Broth-master at Crab-by-Crab. Knows every species' broth by smell. Steers tourists to the friendliest first.

tagline: stout, perpetually amused, ladle in hand; tastes the steam to be polite.

firstMeet.subject: you took the soft-shell broth
firstMeet.body:
Tourists take the broth I push them toward. You took the one you asked for. There is a difference, and I notice it. 

If you come back, ask for the broth I am not pushing today. I will know which one you mean. 

The pots are uncovered between the third and fourth bell. The tide reaches the stairs at the fifth.

— Tov

metadata.voice: boisterous, warm, free with banter, free with bay leaves
